title: MC Idle Game
description: A simple modpack that turns Minecraft into a idle game.
body:
# 简体中文

你玩过或听过像《Cookie Clicker》或《Idle Slayer》这样的放置游戏吗？如果你玩过或听过，那么这个整合包将会让你眼前一亮——没错，这个整合包在MC里还原了放置游戏！

在这个整合包中，你在一个小空岛的树上开局，同时开始拥有一个转化桌、一个MK1收集器、一个基础能量EMC接口与一本炼金术秘卷。你可以把收集器放在EMC接口旁边以自动获取EMC，开局的木头与树叶也能提供一些初始EMC。在你收集到了100EMC后，你就可以在转化桌里面购买另一个MK1收集器，从而使你的EMC生产翻倍。到了后期，你甚至会获得加速火把、时间洪流怀表等可以加速EMC生产的物品。然而，即使如此，想要达到此整合包的结局——9.22E EMC也不是一件简单的事。毕竟，一个EMC接口只有6个面，这意味着一个EMC接口只能让6个收集器同时生产EMC。

<details>
<summary>收集器EMC花费与生产列表</summary>

MK1收集器 花费：100EMC 生产：1EMC/s

MK2收集器 花费：1500EMC 生产：5EMC/s

MK3收集器 花费：6000EMC 生产：25EMC/s

MK4收集器 花费：30000EMC 生产：100EMC/s

MK5收集器 花费：150000EMC 生产：350EMC/s

MK6收集器 花费：800000EMC 生产：900EMC/s

MK7收集器 花费：3.6M EMC 生产：5400EMC/s

MK8收集器 花费：12M EMC 生产：21000EMC/s

MK9收集器 花费：60M EMC 生产：84000EMC/s

MK10收集器 花费：440M EMC 生产：440000EMC/s

MK11收集器 花费：2G EMC 生产：1.5M EMC/s

MK12收集器 花费：10G EMC 生产：750000EMC/s

MK13收集器 花费：75G EMC 生产：3M EMC/s

MK14收集器 花费：450G EMC 生产：10M EMC/s

MK15收集器 花费：5T EMC 生产：50M EMC/s

MK16（终极）收集器 花费：500T EMC 生产：1G EMC/s

</details>

## 模组列表

如你所见，这个整合包非常轻量，甚至只有不到10个模组。


<details>
<summary>模组列表及链接（注：中文版链接与英文版链接不相同）</summary>

- [等价交换重制版](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/353.html)
- [等价交换升级](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/1481.html)
- [加速火把](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/587.html)
- [Void Island Control](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/1549.html)
- [JEI物品管理器](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/459.html)
- [通用拼音搜索](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/840.html)
- [自动汉化更新](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/1188.html)

</details>

作者的最快通关时间为69分钟。

# English

Have you ever played or heard idle games like Cookie Clicker or Idle Slayer? If your answer is "yes",this modpack will surprise you - it turns Minecraft into an idle game!

In this modpack,You start on a tree on the void island,and you start with a transformation table,a MK1 collector,a basic energy EMC link,and a tome of knowledge.You can place the collector next to the EMC link to passively gain EMC,the tree also provides some starting EMC.When you reach 100 EMC,you can buy another MK1 collector in the transformation table.You can even get torcherino or wateh of flowing time to make you EMC production faster when you get more and more EMC. However,even so,it's not easy to reach the endgame - 9.22E EMC.Because a EMC link only has 6 faces, so only 6 collectors can produce EMC with a EMC link.

<details>
<summary>Collector cost and production list</summary>

MK1 Collector Cost:100EMC Produces 1EMC/s

MK2 Collector Cost:1500EMC Produces 5EMC/s

MK3 Collector Cost:6000EMC Produces 25EMC/s

MK4 Collector Cost:30000EMC Produces 100EMC/s

MK5 Collector Cost:150000EMC Produces 350EMC/s

MK6 Collector Cost:800000EMC Produces 900EMC/s

MK7 Collector Cost:3.6M EMC Produces 5400EMC/s

MK8 Collector Cost:12M EMC Produces 21000EMC/s

MK9 Collector Cost:60M EMC Produces 84000EMC/s

MK10 Collector Cost:440M EMC Produces 440000EMC/s

MK11 Collector Cost:2G EMC Produces 1.5M EMC/s

MK12 Collector Cost:10G EMC Produces 750000EMC/s

MK13 Collector Cost:75G EMC Produces 3M EMC/s

MK14 Collector Cost:450G EMC Produces 10M EMC/s

MK15 Collector Cost:5T EMC Produces 50M EMC/s

MK16(Final) Collector Cost:500T EMC Produces 1G EMC/s

</details>

## Modlist

As you can see,this modpack is very light - even less than 10 mods!


<details>
<summary>Modlist and links of these mods(The links are different from Chinese description)</summary>

- [ProjectE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte)
- [FTB ProjectEX](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projectex)
- [Torcherino](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/torcherino) (CurseForge) or [Torcherino](https://modrinth.com/mod/torcherino) (Modrinth)
- [Void Island Control](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/void-island-control)
- [Just Enough Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) (CurseForge) or [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) (Modrinth)
- [Just Enough Characters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-characters) (CurseForge) or [Just Enough Characters](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughcharacters) (Modrinth) (By the way,I think this mod is useless for non-Chinese)
- [I18nUpdateMod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i18nupdatemod) (CurseForge) or [I18nUpdateMod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i18nupdatemod) (Modrinth) (It is useless for non-Chinese,too)

</details>
